$comment: Gemini CLI global settings, managed by dotfiles (cli agent setup → vendors/gemini.py). `mcpServers` and `tools.exclude` are merged in at install time; do not hand-edit those. `tools.exclude` mirrors ai/agents/shared/deny-commands.yaml (gemini surface), drift-gated by test_deny_commands_sync.py. Exclude is a blocklist; we deliberately do NOT set tools.core, because that would disable every unlisted built-in tool.
